title: gateway — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — owner + admin configure gateways + rotate credentials; support role reads the webhook ledger (never credentials); guardian role manages own payment methods. Platform plane (platform_admin) — ops + support read cross-tenant webhook ledger for support-ticket triage (credentials redacted).

permissions.name: gateways.view
permissions.description: Credentials redacted from response. Only display_name, provider, mode, is_active surface.

permissions.name: gateways.create
permissions.description: Configure a new gateway. Credentials are financial-critical.

permissions.name: gateways.test
permissions.description: Send a synthetic test transaction via the provider's sandbox endpoint.

permissions.name: gateways.connect-oauth
permissions.description: Initiate Stripe Connect / OAuth flow to link a provider account.

permissions.name: payment-methods.viewAny
permissions.description: Guardian sees own; admin + owner + finance see all tenant methods (redacted).

permissions.name: payment-methods.delete
permissions.description: Guardian can delete own; admin + owner can delete any.

permissions.name: platform.gateway-webhooks.replay
permissions.description: Cross-tenant support-intervention webhook replay. Every fire notifies the tenant admin + writes audit.
